title: WordPress REST Taxonomy & Post Type Discovery

routes: GET /wp/v2/types/{type}  → get_item (no separate permission_callback; inline checks in get_item)

steps: 1. get_items_permissions_check($request): if context=='edit' → get_post_types(show_in_rest=true) → foreach: if current_user_can(edit_posts) return true → else return WP_Error(rest_cannot_view, 403); if context!='edit' → return true immediately

2. get_items($request): get_post_types(show_in_rest=true, 'objects') → foreach type: [if context=='edit' AND !current_user_can(edit_posts) → skip] → prepare_item_for_response(type, request) → prepare_response_for_collection(post_type) → add to $data keyed by type name

get_fields_for_response($request) → field-gated population of: capabilities(edit only), description, hierarchical, viewable(edit only), labels(edit only), name, slug, supports(edit only), taxonomies, rest_base
3. foreach taxonomy: if show_in_rest AND current_user_can(assign_terms) → return true
3. foreach $taxonomies: [if empty(show_in_rest) → skip] [if context=='edit' AND !current_user_can(assign_terms) → skip]
4. prepare_item_for_response(value, request) → prepare_response_for_collection(tax) → add to $data keyed by tax_type
5. if $data empty → cast to object (ensure JSON object not array)
2. if $tax_obj exists: if empty(show_in_rest) → return false; if context=='edit' AND !current_user_can(assign_terms) → return WP_Error('rest_forbidden_context', 403)
3. return true (non-existent taxonomy is allowed through; 404 handled in get_item)

get_fields_for_response($request) → field-gated population of: name(label), slug(name), capabilities(edit only), description, labels(edit only), types(object_type), show_cloud(edit only), hierarchical, rest_base, visibility(edit only: public/publicly_queryable/show_admin_column/show_in_nav_menus/show_in_quick_edit/show_ui)
rest_ensure_response → add_links(collection href, items href wp/v2/{base})

key_conditions: context='edit' triggers additional permission checks via current_user_can()
show_in_rest flag must be truthy on taxonomy/post-type to be included in listings
Taxonomies get_item: non-existent taxonomy passes permissions check but returns 404 in get_item
PostTypes get_item: all permission + visibility checks are inline (no separate permission_callback route registration)
Empty taxonomy collection returns JSON object {} not array []
key_relationships: WP_REST_Controller provides: get_fields_for_response, add_additional_fields_to_object, filter_response_by_context, prepare_response_for_collection, get_context_param, add_additional_fields_schema, $namespace, $rest_base, $schema
PostTypes prepare_item_for_response cross-references Taxonomies (fetches associated REST-visible taxonomies for a post type)
